title: ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
short_info: The latest ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts! Published at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 35 years age limit and possessing a Master’s degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Plant Breeding and Genetics/Biotechnology/Life Sciences or related subjects can apply through email on or before 20-06-2026. Find all details about the ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow (SRF) new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: five years for SC/ST & women and three years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Plant Breeding and Genetics/Biotechnology/Life Sciences or related subjects
qualification.details: Master's degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Plant Breeding and Genetics/Biotechnology/Life Sciences or related subjects from a recognized University with 4 years/5 years of Bachelor’s degree. OR Candidate having a postgraduate degree in Basic Science with a 3 years Bachelor’s degree and a 2 years Master’s degree should have qualified NET and 02 years of research experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Research Fellow (SRF) in CRP on Molecular Breeding (Tomato)
Senior Research Fellow (SRF) in CRP on Hybrid Technology (Tomato)

selection_process: Application Screening Online Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts at ICAR IARI is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the SRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Master's degree in Genetics, Plant Breeding, Biotechnology, Life Sciences, or related fields. A Master's degree in Basic Science with NET qualification and research experience is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by ICAR IARI.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, women, and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the SRF role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the SRF post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions announced by ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the ICAR IARI SRF recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents via email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the SRF positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts includes application screening, an online interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Senior Research Fellow (SRF) at ICAR IARI are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is ICAR IARI located?
faq.answer: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110012.
